summary_en: Medium-term plan FY2026–2030 established with targets through FY2031 (March 2031). Prior 3-year plan (FY2024–2026) front-loaded final quantitative targets by end of FY2025. Capital-cost and stock-price conscious management framework updated.
title_en: Formulation of Medium-Term Management Plan and Update on Response to Realizing Management Conscious of Capital Cost and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: Marufuji Sheet Piling announced on 14 May 2026 the formulation of a new medium-term management plan covering fiscal years 2026–2030 (ending March 2031). The announcement updates the company's prior capital-cost and stock-price conscious management framework, initially disclosed on 14 May 2025. The prior three-year plan (FY2024–2026) achieved its final-year quantitative targets ahead of schedule by the end of FY2025; the new plan is launched from FY2026 with targets extending to FY2030 (March 2031). Detailed targets and policy frameworks are contained in attached materials.
